case_title: PAULA PHATTANAGOSAI VS. CARL WILLIAM et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER AND STIPULATION TO CONTINUE THE JUN-19-2012 PRE-ARBITRATION SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE AND EXTENDING THE ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PHATTANAGOSAI, PAULA AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAM, CARL DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAR-02-2012 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-29-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         FEB-16-2012
NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF
SUMMONS ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF PHATTANAGOSAI, PAULA
ANSWER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT NEAL, CARL WILLIAM (ERRONEOUSLY SUED AS CARL WILLIAM NEAL AKA CARL WILLIAM)

ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR APR-30-2012. PRE-ARBITRATION SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR JUN-19-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 610. MAR-02-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE MAY-10-2012.
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF APR-09-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PHATTANAGOSAI, PAULA AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAM, CARL

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT PROOF OF SERVICE BY MAIL ATTACHED, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PHATTANAGOSAI, PAULA SERVED NOV-24-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAM, CARL

FEE PAID ON STP TO CONTINUE PRE-ARB SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE AND TO EXTEND TIME FOR ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION FILED BY DEFENDANT NEAL, CARL WILLIAM (ERRONEOUSLY SUED AS CARL WILLIAM NEAL AKA CARL WILLIAM)
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-09-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
PLAINTIFF(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR WILLIAM FRANCIS MCLAUGHLIN.
ARBITRATOR ROGER LOUIS MEREDITH APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION MAY-11-2012 THROUGH AUG-09-2012.
REMOVED FROM PRE-ARBITRATION SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR SET FOR SEP-04-2012 - BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED BY PLAINTIFF PHATTANAGOSAI, PAULA
DECLARATION OF EDGAR W. HAWKYARD FILED BY DEFENDANT NEAL, CARL WILLIAM (ERRONEOUSLY SUED AS CARL WILLIAM NEAL AKA CARL WILLIAM)
PRE-ARBITRATION SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR JUN-19-2012 - CONTINUED TO SEP-04-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610
EXTENSION OF JURISDICTION PERIOD GRANTED JUN-25-2012, WITH A NEW ARBITRATION END DATE OF OCT-04-2012
